name: Midnight Mahjong
short_description: Somewhere in Tokyo, in an exclusive mahjong Club. Rei is a clerk in this club. Her job is to play Mahjong with the guests. Players will operate Rei and play with 3 guests in the authentic Japanese Mahjong. Dead wall draw and Last tile from the wall... It all depends on your skills!!
detailed_description:
STORY

Somewhere in Tokyo, in an exclusive mahjong Club.
Rei is a clerk in this club. Her job is to play Mahjong with the guests.
Players will operate Rei and play with 3 guests in the authentic Japanese Mahjong.
Dead wall draw and Last tile from the wall... It all depends on your skills!!

FEATURES

  • Cute character
  • Full Audio
  • Japanese Mahjong
  • Cheat mode
about_the_game:

Somewhere in Tokyo, in an exclusive mahjong Club.

supported_languages:
Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, English
*languages with full audio support
